name: It begins.
description:
The Maurice Invasion officially begins.
For you, it might have hit the 25th hours ago or you still have to wait (due to time zones). Either way, it's time to act.

Trending page. Mauri-posting on the 24h section, Weekly section, or both is up to you.
You can also go outside of the trending page if you wish, but the trending page is our main focus.

With this start, it will be a burst, but can we keep the momentum until January 1st 2026? Let's march forward and find out, my soldiers!

maurice
creator: Maurice.
